description: CRIT-708 passThreshold `grep -r "#dd5b00" promptnotes/src/lib/editor/SaveFailureBanner.svelte returns exactly one hit` is unsatisfiable. SaveFailureBanner.svelte contains the literal `#dd5b00` on TWO lines: line 36 `data-accent-color="#dd5b00"` (DOM data attribute used for testing) and line 70 `border-left: 4px solid #dd5b00;` (CSS rule per DESIGN.md token). `grep -r "#dd5b00"` reports both, so the count is 2, not 1. Either the threshold must be loosened to `>= 1` or `>= 2`, or the data-accent-color attribute must be reworded.
